name: static_analysis
description: Python static analysis tool for comprehensive code quality and security scanning. Runs pylint, flake8, mypy, bandit, and semgrep to detect code issues, type errors, and security vulnerabilities.
example_usage:
```python
from static_analysis import analyze_code, run_pylint, run_bandit

# Run all analysis tools
result = analyze_code("myproject/")
print(f"Total issues: {result.total_issues}")
print(f"Tools run: {', '.join(result.tools_run)}")

# Run specific tool
issues = run_pylint("main.py")
for issue in issues:
    print(f"{issue.severity}: {issue.message}")

# Security scan
vulns = run_bandit("myproject/")
high_severity = [v for v in vulns if v.severity == "high"]
print(f"High-severity vulnerabilities: {len(high_severity)}")
```
post_add_instructions:
Install static analysis tools:
pip install pylint flake8 mypy bandit

Optional: pip install semgrep

Tools will be detected automatically. Missing tools will be skipped gracefully.
